movie.actors: Jean-Claude Van Damme, Mia Sara, Ron Silver, Bruce McGill
movie.plot: Max Walker, an officer for a security agency that regulates time travel, must fend for his life against a shady politician who's intent on changing the past to control the future.
movie.title: Timecop
movie.writer: Mark Verheiden (screenplay), Mike Richardson (story), Mark Verheiden (story), Mike Richardson (comic series), Mark Verheiden (comic series)
